episodes.title: Melania Trump statement in full: ‘I don’t know Epstein’  | 5 News
episodes.description:
► Epstein survivors have hit out at the statement.

Melania Trump has denied any connection to Jeffrey Epstein in a statement that, even her husband, wasn’t expecting her to make. 

In a press conference at the White House on Thursday, the First Lady said that any claims linking her with the late paedophile, "need to end today", and denied rumours that the financier - who died in jail in August 2019 - introduced her to Donald Trump.

The US President has reportedly said he was "blindsided" by Melania’s statement. 

The First Lady went on to make clear she was not a victim of Epstein, and only briefly "crossed paths" with him in 2000. 

She also dismissed a 2002 email she sent Epstein’s jailed fixer, Ghislaine Maxwell, as evidence of a friendship, saying it was just "casual correspondence" and a "polite reply".

The email in question includes compliments about a story featuring "JE" in New York Magazine and requesting she "give me a call when you are back in NY".

Melania ended her statement by calling for Congress to "provide the women who have been victimised by Epstein with a public hearing specifically centred around the survivors".

Survivors of Epstein’s abuse, have since accused Melania of "shifting the burden" onto them. Others have suggested "there’s a reason" she is speaking out now.

episodes.title: Epstein Files: Photo unearthed shows Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor and Peter Mandelson with Epstein
episodes.description:
► A photo has been unearthed from the Jeffrey Epstein files - showing him with Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor and Peter Mandelson. It's the first known picture of the three men together, thought to have been taken in 1999 or 2000.

#EpstetinFiles #Mandelson

episodes.title: Claims Epstein used private flights at Stansted and Luton airports to transport trafficking victims
episodes.description:
► Police are looking into claims that Jeffrey Epstein used private flights in and out of Stansted, Luton and Birmingham airports to transport trafficking victims. It's after the massive release of files relating to the sex offender in the US.

#Epstein

episodes.title: Leicestershire: Jon Ruben sentenced to 23 years for sexually abusing boys at summer camp | 5 News
episodes.description:
► Have you subscribed to 5 News?: http://bit.ly/5NewsSub 

► 76-year-old Jon Ruben has been jailed for sexually abusing young boys at a summer camp in Leicestershire, after lacing sweets with tranquilisers. He has been sentenced to more than 23 years in prison.

episodes.title: Virginia Giuffre said Prince Andrew acted as if having sex with her was his "birthright", in memoir
episodes.description:
► The late Virginia Giuffre wrote in her memoir how Prince Andrew acted as if having sex with her was his "birthright".

The book is out next week, six months after Ms Giuffre's death, and is about her alleged abuse at the hands of Epstein, Maxwell and the King’s brother. The Duke has always denied any wrongdoing.

Former BBC Royal correspondent Jennie Bond tells 5 News, it's a "sickening graphic account".
